evidence.text: sample agent wired to a Foundry Toolbox via MCP 🌟 Microsoft Learn MCP Server The Microsoft Learn MCP Server gives your AI agent direct access to Microsoft's official documentation — grounded, up-to-date answers about the products and services covered in this session. VS Code — One click installation: GitHub Copilot CLI — Run this to install the Learn MCP Server as a plugin: /plugin install microsoftdocs/mcp For more info, other clients, and to post questions, visit the Learn MCP Server repo .
